calendar.matters:
Petition For Appoinment Of Gary P. Poon As Trustee Without Bond
Off Calendar Nov-19-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: The following matters were heard together: PES-02-282860 Estate of Patrick Pun and PTR-15-299140 The Patrick Pun Trust.
Appearances: Bette Epstein for and with Gary Poon. John Chu for (executor) Gordon Poon.

Mr. Chu stated that his clients oppose the petition, that the trust contains clear instructions regarding the appointment of a trustee, that the trustors wishes should be honored, that the decedents will and trust disinherited Gary Pun, that Gary has claims against Gordon which do not reach Patrick Pun's property, that the only beneficiary to the Patrick Pun estate is the Patrick Pun trust and that there is no reason to keep the decedent's case open. Ms. Epstein stated that the opposition does not comply as it is not verified, that it is full of hearsay and mis-statements, that there are no supporting facts, that it is not properly before the court, that counsel only received the opposition on Friday and was unable to respond, that counsel fails to consider that Gary purchased all of Gordon's interest in bankruptcy, that Judge Wiss appointed Gary to marshal assets in Singapore as Gordon had taken no action to bring them into the estate, that Gary has taken appropriate action and has counsel in Singapore, that Gordon was disqualified and that Annie should be disqualified, that no one knows where they are living, that Annie's request to be appointed is not properly before the court, that Bank of America has declined to serve and that Gary Pun and the grandchildren are the only beneficiaries. Mr. Chu stated that Gordon's attempts to gain custody of the Singapore assets were thwarted, that there is a dispute regarding Gary being entitled, that the bankruptcy purchase was on what was due to Gordon however there was a spendthrift clause to protect the trust from being attacked by creditors, that Gordon's refusal to accept means that everything goes to his daughter Victoriana, that it makes sense for Annie to take on the duties, that she has counsel here and does not need to disclose where she is and if Annie is not appointed it should be a professional. Ms. Epstein stated that the issue regarding the spendthrift clause was fully vetted, that it does not prevent the sale of Gordon's assets in the trust, that Gary has taken on the responsibility of the Singapore accounts and has figured out how to marshal them and that he is working with a bonding company. The accounting petition (case 282860) and the petition for appointment of Gary P. Poon as trustee without a bond was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)
